lines.select: id, entity_type, created_at, entity_versions!inner(id, data, is_current, version_number)

availability.select: branch_id, branch_name, asset_category_id, asset_category_name, total_assets, available_assets, unavailable_assets, maintenance_due_assets, maintenance_overdue_assets

quote_availability.select: line_entity_id, order_id, order_status, branch_id, asset_category_id, requested_quantity, planned_start, planned_end, available_quantity, is_available, shortage_quantity, shortage_reason, alternatives

rerent_unit_status.select: order_line_id, status_key, status_label, changed_at, changed_by, notes

props.children: Live availability check over each requested date range. Conversion revalidates server-side to prevent overbooking.

{{lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.category_name', 'id') || lookupRecordFieldById(data.asset_categories, lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.category_id', 'id') || quoteLine.asset_category_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.name', 'source_record_id') || lookupRecordFieldById(data.availability, quoteLine.asset_category_id, 'asset_category_name', 'asset_category_id') || quoteLine.asset_category_id || 'Uncategorized'}}

Job Site: {{lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.job_site_name', 'id') || lookupRecordFieldById(data.job_sites, lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.job_site_id', 'id'), 'entity_versions[0].data.name', 'source_record_id') || lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.job_site_id', 'id') || 'N/A'}} · Line ID: {{quoteLine.line_entity_id}}

children.if: {{lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.fulfillment_source') === 'internal_substitute' && lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.branch_id') === alternative.branch_id && lookupRecordFieldById(data.lines, quoteLine.line_entity_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.category_id') === alternative.asset_category_id}}

props.children: No quote lines available to evaluate.

props.title: Conversion blocked to prevent overbooking
props.description: Review conflicts and choose one of the suggested alternatives before converting.

props.children: Scope: Branch {{lookupRecordFieldById(data.availability, line.branch_id || data.order.entity_versions[0].data.branch_id, 'branch_name', 'branch_id') || line.branch_id || data.order.entity_versions[0].data.branch_id || 'Any'}} · Category {{lookupRecordFieldById(data.availability, line.category_id, 'asset_category_name', 'asset_category_id') || line.category_id || 'Any'}}
Job Site: {{line.job_site_name || lookupRecordFieldById(data.job_sites, line.job_site_id, 'entity_versions[0].data.name', 'source_record_id') || line.job_site_id || 'N/A'}} · Rate: {{line.rate_type}}
No order lines yet. Use 'Add Line' to capture equipment requirements.

props.title: Internal shortage detected
props.description: Requested {{state.rerent_requested_quantity}} for {{state.rerent_category_id}} with only {{state.rerent_available_quantity}} available internally. Route through preferred-vendor path.

props.label: Manual Override Reason
props.placeholder: Capture why this shortage routing decision was manually overridden
props.name: rerent_override_reason

data.p_data: {{buildRerentLineData(state.rerent_existing_line_data, state.rerent_category_id, state.rerent_requested_quantity, state.rerent_available_quantity, state.rerent_vendor_path, state.rerent_fulfillment_status, state.rerent_override_reason, auth.role || 'missing_auth_role')}}
